properties.passwordReset.email.subject: Password reset
properties.passwordReset.token.email.template:
Dear <Customer> user,

\
            You or someone else entered this email address when trying to change the password of a <Customer> portal user.

\
            Please use the following link to reset your password: 
\
            {host}?token={token}&showTenant

\
            If you were not expecting this email, please ignore it. 

\
            Kind regards,
\
            <Customer> support team
properties.passwordReset.user.not.found.email.templ:
Hi there,

\
            you or someone else entered this email address when trying to change the password of a <Customer> portal user.

\
            However, we could not find the email address in your account. Please contact the administrator of your \
            account to set your email address and password. If you are the administrator of the account,\
            please use the email address that you registered with.

\
            If you were not expecting this email, please ignore it. In case of questions, please get in contact with the administrator of the <Customer> Tesbed portal. 

\
            Kind regards,
\
            The <Customer> support team
properties.passwordReset.success.email.template:
Dear <Customer> user,

\
            Your password on {host} has been recently changed. 
\
            If you or your administrator made this change, you do not need to do anything more. 
\
            If you did not make this change, please contact your administrator.

\
            Kind regards,
\
            Your <Customer> support team
properties.passwordReset.invite.template:
Hi there,

\
            Please use the following link to reset your password: 
\
            {host}/apps/devicemanagement/index.html?token={token}

\
            If you were not expecting this email, please ignore it. 

\
            Kind regards,

\
            Your <Customer> support team
